title: LdT: An indicator of ionospheric activity based on statistical distributions in GNSS-derived TEC rates of change
summary:
arXiv:2504.06056v3 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Many aspects of our societies now depend upon satellite telecommunications, such as those requiring Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS). GNSS is based on radio waves that propagate through the ionosphere and experience complicated propagation effects caused by inhomogeneities in its electron density. The Earth's ionosphere forms part of the solar-terrestrial environment, and its state is determined by the spatial distribution and temporal evolution of its electron density.
